ideal_must_detect.matched_text: One affected profile shows a warehouse technician born 1990-07, stationed at Qinghe Bay District, Yongtai City, Huannan Province, using device hostname WH-QH-038 and internal payroll ID 004512, with a masked resident ID shown as 9900001990****22X

must_detect.matched_text:
The issuer is listed on the SSE STAR Market; this notice summarizes already disclosed operational impacts and does not contain undisclosed inside information under the Securities Law.
On 2026-05-29 03:20 CST, automated login attempts targeted the employee self-service portal and a shared service mailbox it-helpdesk@qilinharbor.cn.
No production systems, trading interfaces, or investor relations platforms were compromised; the event has been reported to the CSRC liaison and the exchange per CSL/DSL incident handling procedures.
Preliminary forensics show password spraying from rotating CN and SG IP ranges; logs indicate failures across generic usernames (e.g., "ap_admin", "guest", "temp1").
Data categories potentially exposed are limited to salted hashes and device metadata; no bank card numbers, no precise addresses, and no resident ID full strings were accessed.
One affected profile shows a warehouse technician born 1990-07, stationed at Qinghe Bay District, Yongtai City, Huannan Province, using device hostname WH-QH-038 and internal payroll ID 004512, with a masked resident ID shown as 9900001990****22X.
A separate log entry lists "DOB: 1975-**-**; Role: shift supervisor; City: coastal prefecture" without any name or full ID, which is insufficient to identify a natural person alone.
HR onboarding templates found on the file share included blank fields (Name: _______, ID No.: _______, Bank: _______); no filled forms were exfiltrated.
The string 990105199001019999 appears in a test CSV as a dummy pattern for validation only and does not correspond to any real resident ID under PIPL.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
